title: Pithecellobium inopinatum
taxonomy: Pithecellobium inopinatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is commonly found in tropical regions. It belongs to the genus Pithecellobium, which contains several species of trees and shrubs. Pithecellobium inopinatum is also known to be a part of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae, within the Fabaceae family. The classification of Pithecellobium inopinatum is further categorized as a member of the Caesalpinioideae subfamily.
